creator: bofh@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,
I was working on an application which requires the Python modules being compiled based on Python3 rather than Python2. However in FreeBSD ports till now the package system cannot detect whether if a Python module/package should build using 2/3 and by default falls to 2. Hence it was the reason of this port.
There are multiple ports based on Python 3 which I require. Unfortunately till now there was no absolute solution for this. Hence I am keeping this port.
